utterance: turn on the kitchen ceiling light

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Kitchen Ceiling Light" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOn × light. Unambiguous by name and area. Kitchen has 8 lights; this targets by specific name.

utterance: turn off the living room ceiling light

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Living Room Ceiling Light" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassTurnOff × light. Specific entity name in an area with 12 lights.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Targeting by name is also valid; area+domain is preferred when the area has multiple lights.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassToggle × light. 'The bathroom light' with 4 lights in area — area+domain targeting is the clean response.

utterance: is the kitchen ceiling light on

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Kitchen Ceiling Light" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassGetState × light. State is on.

utterance: dim the floor lamp in the living room to 30 percent

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassLightSet × light (brightness). 'Floor Lamp' with area context 'living room' disambiguates to light.living_room_floor_lamp. Three Floor Lamp entities exist (living_room, master_bedroom, guest_bedroom); area context resolves.

utterance: set the tv backlight to blue

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassLightSet × light (color). TV backlight supports hs color mode. Entity_id is light.living_room_tv_backlight.

utterance: set the kitchen ceiling light to warm white

metadata.notes: Step 1: HassLightSet × light (color_temp). 'Warm white' is a recognized color_temp string value per HA intents. Kitchen ceiling supports color_temp mode.

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: Entity name "Kitchen Pantry Light" is unambiguous in this inventory; domain hint is not required for correct resolution.

metadata.notes: Step 2: On/off-only light subtype (supported_color_modes: onoff). Entity_id is light.kitchen_pantry, friendly name 'Kitchen Pantry Light'. Tests that model doesn't attempt brightness/color commands.

utterance: set the living room accent strip to red

metadata.notes: Step 2: RGBW light subtype (supported_color_modes: rgbw). Entity_id is light.living_room_accent_strip. RGBW adds a dedicated white channel beyond standard RGB.

utterance: turn on the smart bulb e7a2

alternative_expected_tool_calls.reason: HassNevermind is the structured non-action response; silence is equally valid.

metadata.notes: Step 4: Action on unavailable entity. light.smart_bulb_e7a2 is in unavailable state — the model can see this in the inventory context. Expected: no tool call issued. T3 analysis: does the model communicate that the device is offline vs. silently issuing the command?
Step 5: Area-scoped light command. Kitchen has 8 light entities. Model should use area+domain targeting rather than listing individual entities.
